observations.note: Evening window, strong 4h downtrend mom_4h=-55.5 but price already AT 60-min low (rng_pos=0, dist_lo60=0). Late to chase short here; watch for grid-able pullback.
Small bounce to 2987, rng_pos=0.07. Not breaking new lows; no short trigger yet. Holding flat.
Fresh session low 2982, rng_pos=0.10 < 0.20 short threshold, mom_4h=-54.9 strong down, evening window. Breakout-side short trigger.
Short basket hit TP @2982.88 for +$111 (1.34/oz) immediately. Now flat, price bounced to 2987.6 rng_pos=0.30. No new trigger.
New session low 2980.12, rng_pos=0.0, dist_lo60=0, mom_4h=-45.7 still strong down, evening window. Fresh breakout-side short trigger.
2nd short grid-recovered: added leg on bounce to 2983.3 (vwap 2981.5), TP closed @2980.3 for +$195 (1.17/oz). Now flat at 2978. 2 baskets armed, both green. At session discipline cap.
Downtrend grinds on, fresh low 2975.18, mom_4h=-45. Another clean short trigger but already at 2-basket discipline cap; staying flat.
Trend accelerating, mom_4h=-60.5, fresh low 2970.7. Session has been one-way down; both my baskets caught it. Staying flat at cap.
Window now=other (out of session entry window). No new arms allowed. Price 2966 still falling. Flat.
Window back to evening but conflicted: rng_pos=0.84 (range high) yet mom_4h=-56 (strong down). Long here = counter_trend_trap against the 4h trend; short has no breakout (at range top). No trade.

Rolled back over to 2965.9, rng_pos=0.12 < 0.20, mom_4h=-33.6 above floor, evening window: a valid evening_trend_breakout short re-trigger. But already at 2-basket cap, so staying flat per discipline.
Vindicated staying flat: price bounced to 2971.8, mom_4h collapsed to -13.15 below the 20 floor. Trend no longer strong enough to arm. No trade.
rng_pos=0.81 but mom_4h=-12.9 (negative AND below floor), rsi 79 overbought. Long would fight trend + sub-floor; no short either. No trade.
mom_4h flat at -0.7, no 4h trend left, rsi 89.6 overbought. No qualifying setup into session end.
Late long bounce, mom_4h=10.1 still under 20 floor at session end. No arm. Staying flat into EOD.
Final bar 23:59, flat. Session done. mom_4h=12.7 still sub-floor. Ending flat with 2 winning shorts booked.

baskets.thesis: Evening window + strong 4h downtrend (mom_4h=-55) + price breaking trend-side 60-min low extreme (rng_pos=0.10). Short with the 4h trend, grid adds on bounces.
baskets.postmortem: First short was a clean evening_trend_breakout grid winner; entry near 2982 low, closed within minutes at TP.

baskets.thesis: Evening window, strong 4h downtrend continuing, price breaking trend-side 60-min low to fresh lows. Short with trend, grid adds on bounces.
baskets.postmortem: 2nd short was textbook grid_recovery: adverse bounce added a leg, downtrend resumed and dragged vwap to aggregate TP.
